candidates.why: For a bank, this appears to be the closest equivalent of total revenue/top-line, combining net interest income and non-interest income.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Selected from the full Income Statement labels. For a banking company, 'Total operating income' is the best available top-line analogue to revenue, but this requires manual confirmation because revenue is not labeled explicitly as sales/revenue.
No cost of goods sold / cost of sales concept is evident in these banking statements; leave missing.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line and populated; per rules, prefer this single row over underlying components.
SG&A subcomponent, but should not be used when explicit SG&A line exists and is populated.
SG&A subcomponent, but should not be used when explicit SG&A line exists and is populated.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy.
No dedicated R&D expense line is present.

candidates.why: Direct, populated interest expense line; best match for interest expense.
Same concept but appears as an unpopulated header/alternate label; keep as lower-priority fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on deposits by credit institutions
candidates.why: Too granular; component of total interest expense, not preferred when total line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on deposits and borrowings from the public
candidates.why: Too granular; component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on debt securities in issue
candidates.why: Too granular; component of total interest expense.
Too granular; component of total interest expense.
Too granular/partial; not preferred over total interest expense.
Opposite concept; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest, not the main reported interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct total interest expense line first, with alternate label fallback.

candidates.why: Best equity line because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests; in 2021, adding NCI to this matches 'Total equity'.
Appears to include non-controlling interests in at least some years, so less preferred for BE to avoid double counting with MIB.
Only a component of equity, not total book equity.
Income statement item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Other comprehensive income from companies accounted for under the equity method
candidates.why: Income statement/OCI item, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Tax on other comprehensive income from companies accounted for under the equity method
candidates.why: Tax/OCI item, not book equity.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Total Equity' because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; preferred for minority interest.
Alternate balance-sheet label for the same concept; good fallback.
